mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.user_name AS senderName, u.user_avatar AS senderAvatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE ((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{targetId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{targetId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) AND m.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END AS uid, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, m.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.cover_list AS productCover, p.price AS productPrice, SUBSTRING(MAX(m.content), 1, 50) AS lastMsg, MAX(m.create_time) AS lastTime, SUM(CASE WHEN m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread FROM message m JOIN user u ON u.id = CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = m.product_id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) AND m.product_id > 0 GROUP BY uid, u.user_name, u.user_avatar, m.product_id, p.name, p.cover_list, p.price ORDER BY lastTime DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
